_instrucoes: 1. Obtenha os IDs dos Polatis: curl -s -u onos:rocks http://localhost:8181/onos/v1/devices | python3 -m json.tool
2. Veja as portas Polatis: curl -s -u onos:rocks http://localhost:8181/onos/v1/devices/DEVICE_ID/ports | python3 -m json.tool
3. Preencha remoteDevice com o ID completo (ex: netconf:192.168.1.10/830)
5. Reinstale o driver: mvn clean package -DskipTests e faça DELETE+POST
